name: Adapti, Inc.
business: Adapti, Inc. manages the sales and brand development of health and beauty products under the Dermacia brand and is developing an AI-based software platform, Adapti, to identify social media influencers. The company sells Dermacia cosmetics through its websites and online marketplaces. Adapti has not generated any revenues to date.
sellsTo: women who purchase high-end health and beauty products online

exposures.sentence: The Adapti platform is an AI system that creates a data fingerprint for client products data and even the entire company by utilizing third party AI such as ChatGPT, OpenAI or Google AI tools.
The Company manages the sales and brand development of a line of health and beauty products trade named Dermacia.
The Company sells the Dermacia branded cosmetics (dermaciapro.com) through its related websites and other online marketplaces.

catalysts.sentence: the Company is currently negotiating an amendment to the Membership Interest Purchase Agreement, which the Company anticipates will be entered into and the transaction will close in the Company's second fiscal quarter (the quarter ending September 30, 2025).
The transaction is expected to close in the second calendar quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Management anticipates the Ballengee Group acquisition would bring over $10 million in annual revenues and $5 million in annual EBITDA.
tamClaims.sentence: Management believes that the acquisition of the Ballengee Group could be a transformative acquisition for the Company that management anticipates would bring over $10 million in annual revenues and $5 million in annual EBITDA to the Company.
